criteria.text: GET / renders the whole-store directory from the computed directory index (the ref-index story's seam, consumed — never re-derived): every spec on the default branch and every draft on a design branch appears exactly once, grouped by status per feature dc-2 (drafts in progress, accepted-pending-build, active components, terminal), every entry status-chipped and linking to its board address

every directory entry is disclosed by source — local design branch vs remote-tracking (feature dc-5); an entry whose branch carries an open MR is chipped in review from the forge port, and when the forge cannot be reached the chip degrades to a disclosed 'MR status unavailable' notice while the refs-computed directory still renders fully

a design branch with no draft spec renders as a disclosed notice entry naming the branch, and an entry whose branch was deleted mid-session resolves to a disclosed notice page with a way back — never a dead link, never a silent absence, never a directory-wide failure
